# Smarter Way Wealth - youarepayingtoomuch.com

This site is a fee calculator and visualization tool showing the impact of investment fees over time.

- `/`: The main fee calculator tool.
- `/faq`: Frequently asked questions about RIA fees and the calculator.
- `/how-it-works`: Explanation of the math and assumptions behind the calculator.
- `/our-math`: Deep dive into the mathematical formulas used.
- `/mailer-audit`: A visual roadmap and design brief for Smarter Way Wealth's mailer campaigns.
